creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187762
update to 5.34.0

Simple update to 5.34.0

Changes:
* improved the activity planning dialog
* added the possibility of exporting the data and the timetable as CSV
* added the Spanish translation

Portlint looks fine.
Poudriere testports passed (10.3 and 11.0, http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/logs/deskutils/fet/10amd64-head/fet-5.34.0.log and http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/logs/deskutils/fet/11amd64-head/fet-5.34.0.log).
